isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Intro: All, Moon Sua, Tsuki, Haruna]
Hey (Huh)
Okay
You ready
Huh

[Verse 1: Siyoon, Moon Sua]
힐끗대며 scroll 해 쭉
They need some dopamine (I'm out)
쏟아진 gossip
손끝으로 다들 spill the tea (I'm out)
Losing my poise
흐릿해지는 camino
Whispers spin like carousel
But I don't dance, I cast that spell (I'm live)

[Pre-Chorus: Sheon, Haram, Tsuki]
I don't blink, ain't no doubt
점점 더 gettin' wild
Feel that buzz? I'm live
This is your zap

[Chorus]
We're coming zap
Zap, zap, zap, zap
어제는 빼 오늘로 back
I'm on that zap, zap
Z-Z-Z-Zap
Zap, zap, zap, zap
I push it, do it, let it go (Gimme some more)
I'm on that zap

[Verse 2: Haruna, Tsuki, Moon Sua, Siyoon]
잊고 싶던 memoria
둥실 떠올라
내 머리 위로 지는 sombra
두렵지 않아
I blast them bounce like a tech, yeah, I work the limit
Copycat 조차 따라 못 할 mimic
몇 번이라도 다시 repeatin'
Z-A-P, I'm the whole damn gimmick

[Pre-Chorus: Haram, Suhyeon]
Kick it back to back
날 맴도는 그 nag
All mute 해도 돼
Oh, I came here to slay

[Chorus]
We're coming zap
Zap, zap, zap, zap
어제는 빼 오늘로 back
I'm on that zap, zap
Z-Z-Z-Zap
Zap, zap, zap, zap
I push it, do it, let it go (Gimme some more)
I'm on that zap

[Interlude, All, Haruna, Tsuki]
Ayy, we're coming zap
わかってた ずっと 答えは 私だったって
Ayy, we're coming zap
They told a lie, there was no Billlie

[Bridge: Haruna, Sheon, Moon Sua, Suhyeon, (Tsuki, Haram)]
어지러운 the world, 조금씩 quiet
Show you real me, 나다운 feelin'
이건 no cap 뭐라 해도
I'm in control, you just echo
(We're coming zap; Yeah) 어제는 빼 오늘로 back
(Zap; Ooh) I'm on that zap

[Chorus]
We're coming zap (Oh)
Za-a-a-ap
어제는 빼 오늘로 back (On your back)
I'm on that zap, zap (Oh, woah, oh, yeah)
Z-Z-Z-Zap
Za-a-a-ap (Ooh)
I push it, do it, let it go (Oh, woah; Gimme some more)
I'm on that zap

[Outro: Haruna]
Can you feel it?
